content.en:
"Gu Tu, I didn't expect you to ask me to cooperate?"

An Emperor-level existence came to the vicinity of the Insect Department, met with the Emperor-level Existence Gu Tu of the Insect Department, and said.

"Bin, I need your help to deal with the Emperor-level existence of the Eagle Division, He Lao!" Gu Tu said.

"He Lao, that old guy is not easy to deal with, my strength is a little weaker than him, I can't defeat him, at most I will involve him for a while. Bin said.

"As long as it takes a while, it's fine!"

Gu Tu Dao.

However, Bin didn't immediately agree, but asked, "Gu Tu, dealing with that old guy will undoubtedly offend him, what do you want to do, and what can you pay?"

"I want to kill a genius from the Eagle Division, and as for the reward, how about ten Arrowmu's coins?"

Gu Tu said.

"Ten coins of Aromu, you are really willing to give it!"

Bin was a little surprised.

The Arrow Mu's Coin is a currency refined by the Ultimate Ancient Demon, which circulates between the Ancient Demon level existence and the top Emperor level, and has a strong purchasing power.

And Bin, as an emperor-level existence, doesn't have many Aromu coins, and Gu Tu definitely doesn't have many Aromu coins on his body, and now he is willing to take out ten, which is hemorrhaging!

"Okay, I agree!"

Bin said.

After all, it's just involving He Lao, and it's not desperate, it's just ten coins of Aromu that I picked up for nothing.

......

Eagle Ministry.

He Lao was cultivating when he suddenly received a message that the Youzu had invaded a nearby treasure land, and there was also an emperor-level Youzu appearing.

As soon as possible, He Lao rushed over.

Swish!

In an instant, He Lao came to the place where he was invaded and met Bin.

"Bin, it's you!"

He Lao knew this emperor-level existence, after all, there were only a few emperor-level wanderers nearby, and Bin was one of them.

"He Lao, how about giving me the resources of your treasure land, I've been very poor lately!" Bin said with a smile.

"You're looking for death!"

He Lao was furious and made a move on Bin.

Thundered!!!!

The battle broke out between the two emperor-level in this Ultimate Void, and the other king-level could only retreat, not daring to approach, otherwise they would be affected.

The aftermath of the emperor-level can't bear it!

And just as they were fighting, a group of strong men of the insect department quickly rushed to the Dongmu River, and the emperor-level Gu Tu personally did it.

Originally, it was undoubtedly inappropriate for him to make a move at the emperor level against a new king, but knowing that the king level was very demonic, maybe the top king level would not be able to kill the other party at all, so he had to do it himself, so that he could ensure that nothing went wrong.

......

Outside the Dongmu River.

A group of strong people gathered here.

"Just do it!"

The emperor-level Gu Tu took matters into his own hands, and released a large number of insect creatures, among which there was an emperor-level insect creature, which was also his only insect creature, as for his own strength, it was all dependent on this insect creature.

And the other kings also made a move, attacking the formation here in unison.

Click!!!

In just one breath, the formations here were about to shatter.

The generals in the Dongmu River found that the sky was cracked, and the entire Dongmu River was trembling, and they suddenly realized that something was wrong.

"Elder Tian, what's going on?"

A general asked.

Ye Tian's gaze looked through the Ultimate Void, looked at Gu Tu and the others in the outside world, and said lightly: "It's nothing, one emperor-level, multiple emperor-level came to attack Dongmu River." "

"What, Emperor!"

The general showed despair.

That's the emperor level, and a group of king level, only one king-level elder is sitting in Dongmuhe, where is the opponent!

They will surely die!

"What are you afraid of, I'll deal with it!"

Ye Tian's body moved, and he disappeared.

And this general even suspected that Ye Tian had run away, but he couldn't run, so he could only wait silently to die.

......

Wow!

Outside the Dongmu River, Ye Tian waved his hand to stop the attack of a king-level and face the Gu Diagram directly.

"You're the sky?"

Gu Tu was a little surprised when he saw Ye Tian's move.

"Insect creatures, you should be from the insect department, right?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Gu Tu didn't talk nonsense, he wanted to get rid of Ye Tian as soon as possible, otherwise it would not be good if the old guy He Lao got rid of Bin and rushed over to support.

"Kill!"

If Ye Tian had just broken through to the king level, he might only be able to barely compete with Gu Tu, but now it was different........

His physical body, ultimate rules, and ultimate way are far surpassed, and his strength has undergone a metamorphosis.

"Arrowmu's Blade!"

Ye Tian had cast this top-notch Ultimate Arcane for the first time, which he had created when he was at the Ultimate Extreme, and had never been used in this era.

And now, in order to deal with this emperor-level insect creature, he must use this top-notch ultimate arcane to severely damage or even kill this emperor-level insect creature.

Burst!

The blade of the Arrow Mother easily pierced through the body of the Emperor-level creature, striking it hard.

Followed by.

Ye Tian cast a nian instant, approached a king-level, and slashed him with a single sword.

Puff puff puff!!

A famous king-level was slaughtered by Ye Tian, relying on the ultimate arcane art of Nian Instant, Gu Tu had no way to intercept and protect his own people.

"God, you're looking for !! death"

Gu Tu was angry, these are all the elites of the insect department, if they all die here, then the insect department will lose too much.

He tried his best to intercept Ye Tian, but he didn't do it.

After a while, Gu Tu saw that his people were all slaughtered.

And immediately after, Ye Tian once again used the blade of the Arrow Mother and directly killed his emperor-level insect creature.

Soon.

Gu Tu's body was severely damaged, and he couldn't stop the blade of Arromu.

Of course.

After casting the Arrow Mother Blade 4.3 times in a row, Ye Tian's body was also full of cracks, which was the price of the top ultimate arcane art of the Arrow Mother Blade.

"If I die, you don't want to live!!"

The Gu Diagram went crazy, and the ultimate particles in his body turned into a special pattern, and a strange force connected Ye Tian and the Gu Diagram itself.

"Ultimate Gu Technique - Ancient Demons Destroy Together!"

Bang!

The Gu Tu itself was annihilated, and a force of annihilation also annihilated Ye Tian's copy body.

But soon.

Ye Tian's other copy body appeared here, "This emperor level is really amazing, the last technique actually made one of my copy bodies fall, it seems that I can't underestimate any emperor level here!"

Next, how should he explain to the patriarch that he had killed Gu Tu and this group of king-level existences?
